title: PRE Adam and Eve
wikitext:
[]: PRE--Adam and Eve?             Quote Post by master0rolando » Thu Aug 24, 2006 3:00 am i think that the PRE Adam, Eve, Lilith roles were already played out...at least for about half of the show think about this....(i want to hear Reichu's opinion on this one...since she seems to know everything on Eva) Shinji = Adam...Gendo = God...Rei = Angels now im sure you know of the stories of the reactions of the Angels when Adam was made.... Shinji in the beggining is new and afraid, doesnt know whats goin on...you know...Rei was there before Shinji...she knows the deal....what is what...in fact...she knows all about the whole Third Impact thingy, really.....so she knows stuff Shinji couldnt possibly imagine or comprehend at that point Much like how the Angels were always there and were face to face with God...long before Adam was made... Shinji cant stand his dad telling him what to do....much like us-- as in humans/ which Adam was--- but he also desires his approval-- again just like us...humans/ adam In the anime she slap hims int he face at his distrust of "The Father"....but in the manga Rei displays a repressed dissatisfaction with Shinji... In tales of Adam...there is one where the angels look at Adam and say something along the lines of "Surely he is not the image of the Lord" and dissaprove of him...(yay im making the connection) Adam was then put under tests and succeded..... Shinji was put under tests and succeded.....fighting the Angels (BTW-- you know how angels will "help" and protect us and stuff...but in the end we gotta be the ones who "pull the trigger"....you already know im talking about how Rei sheilds but only for so long and Shinji has to shoot in the Ramiel fight) When Adam completes his test...the angels all go something like "Surely he is the image of the Lord... When Shinji saves Rei from the burining plug...she sees Gendo...in a flash...then smiles at Shinji in approval...(need i repeat...IMAGE OF THE LORD)....i think thats an obvious one... also...Rei does nothing and says nothing if she disagress with a command from Gendo...much like an Angel would to God (however in EoE she basically says "f- you bitch----much like how Lilith went with Sammael......she disobeyed) [ wasnt it she like bumped nasties with him and as punishment one of her childeren die everytime a guy jerks one out...thats about right?--THATS why Lilith is on a cross...its a symbol of how God punishes...with crosses)...now we know where Catholics get the "Everytime you masturbate, God kills a ---] Shinji will obey but will complain, and question and protest...and at one point refuse but end up doing it anyway....much like guys Asuka will do something if it seems cool to her...if she thinks the command is a load of crap...she says "f--off"......much like Woman... as in how Eve sinned first and tempted Adam...she kept telling Shinji to stop being a wimp and not do everything others say.....im on a roll

[]:             Quote Post by ayanami_the_fifth » Thu Aug 24, 2006 9:00 am a detailed analysis... actually eva is more of a piece of literature than just a normal anime like gundam or others along the same line......

[]: Re: PRE--Adam and Eve?             Quote Post by Reichu » Thu Aug 24, 2006 9:14 am master0rolando wrote: [ wasnt it she like bumped nasties with him and as punishment one of her childeren die everytime a guy jerks one out...thats about right?--THATS why Lilith is on a cross...its a symbol of how God punishes...with crosses)...now we know where Catholics get the "Everytime you masturbate, God kills a ---]

[]:             Quote Post by master0rolando » Thu Aug 24, 2006 5:56 pm sooooo........do yall agree wiht me or what?

[]:             Quote Post by ObsessiveMathsFreak » Fri Aug 25, 2006 6:44 pm master0rolando wrote: sooooo........do yall agree wiht me or what?

[]:             Quote Post by Timstuff » Fri Aug 25, 2006 7:44 pm Precisely, which is why I've pretty much given up on trying to make sense of them in that manner.

[]:             Quote Post by Xanatose » Fri Aug 25, 2006 8:47 pm I also hold that the religious dogma has to be taken as having little importance on the show, where as science fiction referinces and conventions, and psycological theories, including Jungian views, takes on greater relavence. It would be of greater relavence to compare the psycology of religious texts, than the religious texts themselves, to the show. Yet even this is a stretch. Put down the "Encyclopedia of Angels" in exchange for "The Portable Jung," and you'd be getting a bit warmer.

[]:             Quote Post by master0rolando » Fri Aug 25, 2006 10:28 pm you couodve just said...."No".....

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Sat Aug 26, 2006 12:37 pm Actually, you really do need to investigate the religious stuff to shed light on the "pointless minutiae". There is so much pedantry going on that research is the only option for the curious. Everything connects, as well; no definitive lines can be drawn as to where, for example, the religious/esoteric-based themes end and psychological/philosophical themes begin. It's all a matter of knowing how to keep things in context. Dismissing certain parts of NGE seems like a sort of dogma in and of itself. But, yeah, m0, I think you're barking up the wrong tree.

[]:             Quote Post by master0rolando » Sat Aug 26, 2006 12:51 pm jamnit...at least i supported it with decent evidence right?...sheesh... oh well... HIKARI FTW.....just wanted to say that

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Sat Aug 26, 2006 12:56 pm master0rolando wrote: jamnit...at least i supported it with decent evidence right?...sheesh...

[]:             Quote Post by master0rolando » Sat Aug 26, 2006 1:02 pm hehe....Ya caught me!
